context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the 360-degree spin viewer with requestIdleCallback-based lazy frame loading, requestAnimationFrame throttling for mobile, correct drag sensitivity, keyboard support, and appropriate ARIA attributes.

checklist.name: requestIdleCallback preload
checklist.description: Remaining frames (frames after the first) are preloaded using requestIdleCallback rather than being preloaded eagerly all at once or via setTimeout

checklist.name: requestIdleCallback timeout
checklist.description: The requestIdleCallback call includes a { timeout: 5000 } option

checklist.name: requestAnimationFrame throttling
checklist.description: Frame index updates on touch/pointer move are throttled using requestAnimationFrame (rAF) rather than updating directly on every event

checklist.name: 8px per frame sensitivity
checklist.description: The drag-to-frame mapping uses approximately 8 pixels of movement per frame (e.g., Math.round(delta / 8) or equivalent)

checklist.name: Loading state
checklist.description: A loading state is displayed while frames are being preloaded, before the viewer becomes interactive

checklist.name: Keyboard left/right arrows
checklist.description: The spin viewer responds to left and right arrow key presses to navigate between frames

checklist.name: role img aria-label
checklist.description: The spin viewer container has role='img' and an aria-label that references rotating/dragging the product (e.g., '360 degree product view' or similar)

checklist.name: ew-resize cursor
checklist.description: The spin viewer container uses cursor: ew-resize (or cursor: 'ew-resize' inline style)

checklist.name: Drag hint text
checklist.description: A visible 'Drag to rotate' (or equivalent) hint text element is rendered with aria-hidden='true'

checklist.name: Notes: requestIdleCallback reason
checklist.description: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md mentions requestIdleCallback (or idle callback) as the mechanism for background frame preloading

checklist.name: Notes: rAF throttling reason
checklist.description: IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md mentions requestAnimationFrame (or rAF) as the mobile jitter prevention technique

checklist.name: Frame wrap-around
checklist.description: Frame index wraps correctly at both ends (modulo arithmetic so frame after last returns to first, and before first goes to last)
